RangedHeal2.description: Heal other units in an area at range.

Malaise.name: Malaise
Malaise.description: Inflict Weakness on units in an area.

Malaise2.description: Inflict Weakness and Poison on units in an area.

OpenWounds.name: Open Wounds
OpenWounds.description:
An attack that deals more damage the less health the target unit has.
[s:.7](based on their health percent)[/s]

OpenWounds2.description:
An attack that deals even more damage the less health the target unit has.
[s:.7](based on their health percent)[/s]

Prayer2.description: Heal units in a larger area. Infinite range.

Convert.name: Convert
Convert.description: Inflict Charm 2 on an adjacent unit.

Convert2.description: Inflict Charm 2 on an adjacent unit. Non-boss enemies with less than 25% health join your party.

Cleanse.name: Cleanse
Cleanse.description: Remove all debuffs from units in an area.

Cleanse2.description: Remove all debuffs from units in an area. Those units get +1 [img:divineshield] for each debuff removed.

Purge.name: Purge
Purge.description: Remove all buffs from a unit.

Purge2.description: Remove all buffs from a unit. Deal 3 damage to that unit for each unique status effect removed.

Haste.name: Haste
Haste.description: Give a unit +10 [img:spd] until the end of its next turn.

Haste2.description: Give units in an area +10 [img:spd] until the end of their next turns.

Rally.name: Rally
Rally.description: Force a unit to attack one of its enemies.

Rally2.description: Force units in an area to each attack one of their enemies.

BuddyUp.name: Buddy Up
BuddyUp.description: Jump to an open tile next to an ally.

BuddyUp2.description:
Jump to an open tile next to an ally.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

HealingFall.name: Healing Fall
HealingFall.description: Jump to an open tile, then heal each adjacent unit.

HealingFall2.description:
Jump to an open tile, then heal each adjacent unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

RallyCharge.name: Holy Dash
RallyCharge.description: Dash forward, heal a unit and give it a random stat up.

RallyCharge2.description: Dash forward, heal a unit and give it 3 random stat ups.

ReverseDamage.name: Reverse Damage
ReverseDamage.description: Reverse the last damage an adjacent unit took.

ReverseDamage2.description: Reverse the last damage a unit within range took.

Rebuke.name: Rebuke
Rebuke.description: Deal damage to a unit equal to the damage that unit last dealt.

Rebuke2.description: Deal damage to a unit equal to twice the damage that unit last dealt.

Wish.name: Wish
Wish.description:
Target an area. At the beginning of your next turn, heal all units in that area.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Wish2.description:
Target an area. At the beginning of your next turn, heal all units in that area. This spell tracks its target if you directly targeted a unit.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

WitchHunt.name: Witch Hunt
WitchHunt.description: Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, its killer gains All Stats Up.

WitchHunt2.description:
Put a bounty on a unit. When that unit dies, it becomes meat and its killer gains All Stats Up.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

FriendOrFoe.name: Friend or Foe
FriendOrFoe.description: A ranged spell that heals allies and damages enemies.

FriendOrFoe2.description: An infinitely ranged spell that heals allies and damages enemies.

Revive.name: Revive
Revive.description: Revive a body to 50% HP and cure one of its injuries.

Revive2.description: Revive a body to 100% HP and cure one of its injuries. If it was an enemy, it gets charmed.

HolyLight.name: Holy Light
HolyLight.description: Heal allies and damage enemies in an area. This spell has half effect outside its center.

HolyLight2.description:
Heal allies and damage enemies in an area. This spell has half effect outside its center.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Ethereal2.description:
Gain Thorns 6, Reflect 5, 4 [img:divineshield],
3 [img:shield], heal 2 HP and Brace 1.

BornAgain.name: Born Again
BornAgain.description: Revive a body to 100% HP and give it All Stats Up, then you fall asleep.

BornAgain2.name: Born Again
BornAgain2.description: Revive a body to 100% HP and give it All Stats Up.

Benediction2.description:
Heal EVERYTHING for 2 HP.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Crusade.name: Crusade
Crusade.description: You and your allies move toward the nearest enemy.

Crusade2.description: You and your allies move toward the nearest enemy and gain +1 [img:str].

HallowedGround.name: Hallowed Ground
HallowedGround.description: Spawn a blessing pickup on an empty tile in range.

HallowedGround2.description: Spawn a blessing pickup on any empty tile.

Enlighten.name: Enlighten
Enlighten.description: Another unit's next spell is free.

Enlighten2.description:
Another unit's next spell is free. Infinite range.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Anoint.name: Anoint
Anoint.description: Give +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration and +1 to a random stat to an adjacent unit.

Anoint2.description: Give +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration and +1 to 2 random stats to any unit.

EyeForAnEye.name: An Eye for an Eye
EyeForAnEye.description: A melee attack that inflicts Blind 5 and Bleed 1.

EyeForAnEye2.description: A melee attack that inflicts Blind 5, Bleed 1, and Madness 1.

WrathOfGod.name: Wrath of God
WrathOfGod.description: Deal holy damage and inflict Blind to everything except for a safe circle around you. This vaporizes units it kills.

WrathOfGod2.description: Deal holy damage and inflict Blind to all enemies. This vaporizes units it kills.

Adoubement.name: Adoubment
Adoubement.description:
Heal a unit and remove its debuffs. That unit gets +1 to a random stat and becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell has infinite range and must target it.

Adoubement2.description:
Heal or revive a unit and remove its debuffs. That unit gets +1 to 3 random stats and becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell has infinite range and must target it.

DivineProtection.name: Divine Protection
DivineProtection.description:
Give a unit +1 [img:divineshield] and +1 Kinetic Spikes. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell costs less and must target it.

DivineProtection2.description:
Give a unit anywhere +1 [img:divineshield] and +2 Kinetic Spikes. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell costs less and must target it.

ChosenWarrior.name: Chosen Warrior
ChosenWarrior.description:
Give a unit +1 Damage. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives +1 bonus attack.

ChosenWarrior2.description:
Give a unit +1 Damage and +1 Magic Damage. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives +1 bonus attack.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

SwiftSanctify.name: Swift Servant
SwiftSanctify.description:
Give a unit +1 Bonus Move. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it and it gives you +1 Bonus Move too.

SwiftSanctify2.description:
Give a unit +1 Bonus Move. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell has infinite range, costs less and must target it, and it gives you +1 Bonus Move too.

DivineGift.name: Divine Gift
DivineGift.description:
Gain All Stats Up. This spell costs 1 mana less for each HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

DivineGift2.description:
Gain All Stats Up and +1 [img:divineshield]. This spell costs 1 mana less for each HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

HolyWeapon.name: Holy Weapon
HolyWeapon.description:
A dash attack with range, damage, and knockback equal to the amount of HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

HolyWeapon2.description:
A dash attack with range, damage, and knockback equal to twice the amount of HP you healed other units this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

GetDown.name: Stand In
GetDown.description:
Swap positions with any unit. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it.

GetDown2.description:
Swap positions with any unit and heal it by 1 HP. That unit becomes the Alpha.
If there is an Alpha, this spell must target it.

Awaken2.description: Revive a body to 1 HP. Give that unit +1 [img:divineshield] and All Stats Up.

Baptism.name: Fury Heal
Baptism.description: Heal an adjacent unit 2 to 6 times.

Baptism2.description: Heal an adjacent unit 2 to 6 times. Each heal gives +1 to a random stat.

Pray.name: Pray
Pray.description: Give another unit +5 [img:lck] until the end of its next turn.

Pray2.name: Pray
Pray2.description: Give allies +5 [img:lck] and enemies -5 [img:lck] until the end of their next turns, in an area.

Emergency.name: Emergency
Emergency.description: Run next to the ally with the most missing health. Trample all in the way.

Emergency2.description:
Run next to the ally with the most missing health. Trample all in the way.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

GuardianAngel.name: Guardian Angel
GuardianAngel.description:
Make a unit The Alpha.
Bonus Passive: The Alpha has +50% dodge chance.

GuardianAngel2.description:
Make a unit anywhere The Alpha.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]
Bonus Passive: The Alpha has +50% dodge chance.

Booster.name: Booster
Booster.description: Heal an adjacent unit. Excess healing is converted to an equal amount of random stat ups.

Booster2.description: Heal a unit at range. Excess healing is converted to an equal amount of random stat ups.

Stimulants2.description: You and adjacent units gain +2 [img:spd] and +1 [img:int].

BlindingLight.name: Blinding Lights
BlindingLight.description: Inflict Blind 1 on each unit in an area.

BlindingLight2.description: Inflict Blind 2 on each unit in a larger area.

CircleOfProtection.name: Circle of Protection
CircleOfProtection.description: Give +1 [img:divineshield] to each unit within 2 tiles of you.

CircleOfProtection2.description:
Give +1 [img:divineshield] and +1 Health Regeneration to each unit within 2 tiles of you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

CallOver.name: Call Over
CallOver.description: Make an ally move toward you.

CallOver2.description: Make an ally move toward you. Infinite range.

Grace.name: Grace
Grace.description: You or an adjacent unit gains a random positive effect.

Grace2.name: Grace
Grace2.description: You or an adjacent unit heals a random amount of HP, gains +1 to a random stat, and gains a random positive effect.

TurnFoe.name: Turn Foe
TurnFoe.description: Force a nearby unit to move away from you.

TurnFoe2.description: Force a nearby unit to move away from you. If it was an enemy, inflict Madness 1 and Confusion 1.

HealingSalve.name: Healing Salve
HealingSalve.description: You or an adjacent unit gains +1 Health Regeneration.

HealingSalve2.description: You or an adjacent unit gains +2 Health Regeneration.
